examples: Barramundi Fillet, Crayfish Mornay, Dorper Lamb and Beef Cheek feature.
The whole baby barramundi fried in lime and palm sugar is suitably sumptuous.
More than just black bass lurk in these lakes. Also, there is a lake in which BARRAMUNDI inhabits.
It is also renowned as one of the best barramundi fishing spots in Australia.
Its take on surf and turf, a beef and barramundi barbecue, is almost as legendary as the pub itself.
